case_title: FRANKLIN JONATAN FLORES COLINDRES VS. INTEGON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES COLINDRES, FRANKLIN JONATAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT INTEGON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES COLINDRES, FRANKLIN JONATAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INTEGON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY THE COURT ENTERS A CONDITIONAL JUDGMENT AS SET FORTH IN THE ATTACHED MC-025. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,326.62 FILED BY FLORES COLINDRES, FRANKLIN JONATAN AS TO DEFENDANT INTEGON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT INTEGON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES COLINDRES, FRANKLIN JONATAN AS TO DEFENDANT INTEGON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN FLORES COLINDRES IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY. DEFENDANT INTEGON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM DIRK, FIELD REP AGENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS INCOMPLETE AS CERTIFIED MAIL HAS NOT BEEN RETURNED BY USPS. DEFENDANT DOES NOT DISPUTE SERVICE INDICATING CLAIM WAS SENT BY AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
